name: DOLLAR
description: Unit Delay - delays the input signal by one sample period (z^-1)
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock interfaceFunctionName="DOLLAR" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="dollar4" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="DOLLAR">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="2" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
criticalRules: Updates only on event clock edge
